name: Cheesy Spinach Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick the bottom and sides of the pie shell with a fork.
2. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes. Cool on a rack.
3. Cook spinach according to package directions; drain well.
4. Cut cheese into 1/2-inch slices and toss with flour. Set aside.
5. Combine eggs, cream, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
6. Stir in the cooked spinach and cheese mixture.
7. Spoon the filling into the pie shell.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour. Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
